title: SAN-881 calibration corpus coverage manifest
description: Sealed authoring artifact: surface name -> [evidence record, ...]. Surfaces are dynamically enumerated from the pinned tables JSON (one entry per facet family, measure-facet value role, concept family, comparator sequence, EXCL pair, COMPLEMENT pair, condition operator, quantifier class) plus a small explicit inventory for non-table behaviors. An empty evidence array is a documented v1 coverage gap, not a schema violation.
